title: rubus cicur
intro: Rubus cicur, also known as the dwarf or wild raspberry, is a type of flowering plant native to Europe. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to its rich content of ellagic acid and other polyphenols. The health benefits of Rubus cicur include reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus cicur can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
